name: John Doe
history: Ongoing work-related uncertainty and anxiety. Married recently; the relationship included instances of physical abuse by spouse Ivan and resulted in separation. Both partners are interested in resolving issues and are attending couples therapy.
intermediate_belief: If I don't marry her, she will be sad and it will be my fault.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must intellectualize to manage my feelings.
coping_strategies: Intellectualizing emotions to avoid feeling them.
situation: Exposed to clinical terms used to describe the spouse's behavior during therapy sessions.
auto_thought: I feel like I'm losing control over myself.
behavior: Avoids addressing feelings directly, intellectualizes emotions, considers acting out by seeking relationships outside marriage.
